changelog:
/review:sweep remediation of v4.55–v4.60 (guardrail nudge tier + /evolve). SECURITY (A1): in the Bash guardrail (guardrail.cjs processEvent) the four-tier path-access check now runs BEFORE the nudge/confirm decision — previously `rm -rf .env # guardrail:confirm` escalated a zeroAccessPath (a should-be-HARD-block) to a user-approvable confirm; the path-tier hard block now wins and ignores the escalation marker. (A2) Fixed the PowerShell nudge regex: `/Remove-Item .+-Recurse .+-Force/` never matched the canonical single-space `Remove-Item foo -Recurse -Force` (the .+ required a char BETWEEN the flags) — now matches either flag order. (A3) git-rm exemption anchored to a real git INVOCATION via `(?<!(?:^|[\s;&|(])git )` so `legit rm` and `X=git rm` (a var-assignment prefix on a real rm) still nudge; only a standalone `git rm` is exempt. 3 new live-rules regression tests. /evolve data-loss + dry-run fixes: (B1) Step 3 archives each file individually with a per-file existence guard + asserts the archive is populated before regeneration — a bare `git mv TODO_epic*.md` glob that did not expand aborted the whole git mv atomically, after which Step 5 overwrote the un-archived backlog (data loss). (B2) Step 4 _cycle-summary.md write now skipped under --dry-run; (B8) Step 2a /listen guarded under --dry-run; (B9) telemetry exception noted. (B4) emoji-only completeness files now gate-block on non-done states. (B5) cycle number derived from max(existing N)+1, not raw dir count. (B3) cp snapshots per-file guarded. (B6) /todo epic-number branch requires the entire trimmed INPUT to be one integer token (no '12 factor app setup' misroute). code-review skill: added a 'verify moved/relocated patterns still match at the new home' check. Gate: 1882 tests pass.

--- v4.60 ---
Tertiary /evolve enhancement — master-index next-epic resolution. Empty `/todo` (no INPUT) now reads docs/TODO_{Project}.md, picks the next epic (prefers an in-progress epic, else the first not-done one in index order; if all done, says cycle complete → suggests /evolve), resolves it to its epic number, and hands off to the epic-number branch. Closes the lifecycle 'what now?' loop no command previously read the master index for: after /evolve Step 5.6 makes the lead epic runnable, subsequent epics are picked up automatically by a bare `/todo` — the loop self-continues without re-running /evolve. Implemented as an inference source in /todo's empty-INPUT chain (#2, after conversation context, before handoff/git fallbacks) rather than a new /next command, to avoid command-surface bloat. evolve.md Step 5.6 cross-references the loop. Markdown-only; gate: 1879 tests pass.

--- v4.59 ---
/evolve adopter-finding remediation (Domdhi.Crypto first real run). (1) Primary — /evolve now ends RUNNABLE, not just planned: new Step 5.6 materializes the lead dependency-root epic into an execution-ready TODO_epic*.md via /create:project-epics-todo + /todo (only the lead epic, just-in-time; the rest break down as reached). Default on; --no-todo opts out. The Step-7 Next: line now points at a TODO that actually exists instead of a /run-todo with no contract behind it. (2) Secondary — /todo is now epic-number aware: `/todo 12` (or epic-N/epicNN) reads Epic N's stories straight from _backlog.md as the brief instead of treating the number as literal task text; mirrors /create:project-epics-todo and is the unit Step 5.6 calls. (3) EV4 — /evolve Step 1 completeness gate now cross-checks the _backlog.md emoji Story-Index against the checkbox tally and flags disagreement (checkboxes stay authoritative; stale-emoji drift is surfaced, not silently trusted). (4) EV7 — doc-drift.js TODO_SKIP_DIRS now includes `_archive` (underscore) so a closed cycle's git-mv'd TODO_epic*.md under docs/todo/_archive/cycle-N/ is no longer false-flagged as a misplaced TODO; the prior set only had `.archive` (dot). Already shipped in v4.57: EV3 (memory store in evidence sweep) + EV5 (headless orchestration). Gate: 1879 tests pass.
